x_snc_airop_check_definition.ai_justification: Broken CI relationship records create dead ends in Now Assist relationship traversal. Orphaned CIs provide zero relationship context for AI impact analysis regardless of attribute quality.
x_snc_airop_check_definition.remediation_guidance: Clean up broken cmdb_rel_ci records via cmdb_rel_ci_list.do?sysparm_query=parent.sys_class_pathISEMPTY^ORchild.sys_class_pathISEMPTY. Enable CMDB Health jobs to automatically identify orphaned CIs. Broken relationships create dead ends in Now Assist impact traversal.

sys_update_version.name: x_snc_airop_check_definition_0203a33acfd903108935fb251d851c64
sys_update_version.payload:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update><x_snc_airop_check_definition action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE">
<ai_justification><![CDATA[Broken CI relationship records create dead ends in Now Assist relationship traversal. Orphaned CIs provide zero relationship context for AI impact analysis regardless of attribute quality.]]></ai_justification>
<check_name>Orphaned CI Count</check_name>
<check_script><![CDATA[(function(checkDef, dateFilter) {
    var ga = new GlideAggregate('cmdb_rel_ci');
    ga.addEncodedQuery('parent.sys_class_pathISEMPTY^ORchild.sys_class_pathISEMPTY');
    ga.addAggregate('COUNT');
    ga.query();
    var broken = ga.next() ? parseInt(ga.getAggregate('COUNT')) : 0;

    var actualValue = broken + ' broken cmdb_rel_ci records (NULL parent/child sys_class_path)';

    if (broken === 0) {
        return { status: 'ready', actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: 'No broken CI relationship records found. Now Assist impact traversal has no dead ends from orphaned relationship records.' };
    } else if (broken < 100) {
        return { status: 'needs_attention', actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: broken + ' broken CI relationship records. These create dead ends in Now Assist impact traversal — clean up orphaned records.' };
    } else if (broken < 1000) {
        return { status: 'needs_attention', actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: broken + ' broken CI relationship records. Significant orphaned relationship issue — Now Assist impact analysis will encounter frequent dead ends.' };
    } else {
        return { status: 'not_ready', actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: broken + ' broken CI relationship records. Critical orphaned relationship problem — Now Assist impact traversal is severely impaired by the volume of broken records.' };
    }
})]]></check_script>
<is_active>true</is_active>
<is_clone_sensitive>false</is_clone_sensitive>
<is_manual>false</is_manual>
<module>CMDB</module>
<number>CHK0006010</number>
<order>130</order>
<remediation_guidance>Clean up broken cmdb_rel_ci records via cmdb_rel_ci_list.do?sysparm_query=parent.sys_class_pathISEMPTY^ORchild.sys_class_pathISEMPTY. Enable CMDB Health jobs to automatically identify orphaned CIs. Broken relationships create dead ends in Now Assist impact traversal.</remediation_guidance>
<sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by>
<sys_created_on>2026-06-09 22:05:59</sys_created_on>
<sys_id>0203a33acfd903108935fb251d851c64</sys_id>
<sys_mod_count>0</sys_mod_count>
<sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by>
<sys_updated_on>2026-06-09 22:05:59</sys_updated_on>
</x_snc_airop_check_definition></record_update>
